title: Polish responsive workspace surfaces
description: Harden mobile and narrow-width layout behavior across Files, Tasks, Swarm, Agents, Chat, Crew, Dashboard, and shell chrome so dense workspace screens remain usable on small viewports.

title: Split focused UI regression tests by surface
description: Add lightweight source/behavior regression tests for responsive layout contracts so future UI changes catch mobile shell, files, and navigation regressions quickly.

title: Separate Vitest from native-node and Playwright suites
description: Keep Vitest discovery focused on frontend/unit tests by excluding services and e2e directories that are owned by other runners.

title: Reduce lint baseline before enforcing repo-wide lint in cron
description: Resolve the existing strict-type lint backlog or add changed-line lint accounting so auto-improvement cycles can fail only on newly introduced lint regressions.
